def negative_dataclass_mutable_default():
    rule_id = "dataclass_mutable_default"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Dataclass fields that use mutable defaults instead of default_factory."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
